falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear upward trend would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate invalidation of the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume increases by more than 200% compared to the previous 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would suggest strong market conviction, refuting the 'UNKNOWN' phase and 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 for three consecutive trading days within the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major benchmark index breaking key resistance would invalidate the pattern's similarity to 'bottom_2024_aug' and the current blowoff score.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
